title: symphyotrichum × salignum
intro: Symphyotrichum × salignum, also known as New York aster, is a hybrid plant species within the Symphyotrichum genus, commonly found in North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds, such as flavonoids and sesquiterpenes. The health benefits of Symphyotrichum × salignum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity against various pathogens. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to leverage its medicinal properties.
